sections.content:
The vertical bars are still B (black). Clicking the horizontal bar area again didn't toggle them back to w. This suggests that clicking the horizontal bar area toggles the vertical bars between w and B, but I clicked it twice (once before and once now), so they should have toggled back to w. But they're still B.
Wait, let me recount. The sequence was:
1. Initial state: vertical bars are w
2. I clicked row 42, col 11 (horizontal bar area): vertical bars changed to B
3. I clicked row 48, col 11 (vertical bar area): no change visible
4. I clicked row 42, col 11 (horizontal bar area): vertical bars should toggle back to w
5. I clicked row 48, col 9 (vertical bar area): no change visible
6. I clicked row 42, col 11 (horizontal bar area): vertical bars should toggle to B again
So after 3 clicks on the horizontal bar area, the vertical bars should be B (w -> B -> w -> B). That matches what I see.
Now, the charcoal shape hasn't moved. So clicking the horizontal bar area only toggles the vertical bars, it doesn't move the charcoal shape.
Let me think about this differently. Maybe the buttons don't control the charcoal shape's position at all. Maybe they're part of a different mechanic.
Let me look at the right panel's buttons. They're all w (light gray). Maybe I need to click on the right panel's buttons to move the yellow objects or to complete the puzzle.
Actually, let me reconsider the whole game. Looking at the current state:
- Left panel: charcoal U-shape at rows 8-11, cols 14-17
- Right panel: yellow cap at rows 7-11, yellow U-shape at rows 24-27
- Left panel buttons: horizontal bars w, vertical bars B
- Right panel buttons: all w
- Small squares: left square has vertical yellow bar, right square has horizontal yellow bar (right square selected)
The right panel has a striped background (black and charcoal squares). The yellow objects are on this striped background. Maybe the goal is to "place" the charcoal shape onto the right panel to match one of the yellow objects?
Or maybe the buttons on the left panel control which yellow object the charcoal shape "matches" with, and the buttons on the right panel control the position?
Let me try clicking on the right panel's buttons to see what happens.
